title: MarketIndex As-of Gate Audit
disclaimer: research tool only — no auto trading — no precision prediction claim — no DB write — no external API — no LLM call — no strategy mutation — no regime logic mutation — no performance claim — no edge claim

queryPaths.previousBehavior: prisma.marketIndex.findMany({ where: { name: 'TAIEX' } }) — NO date upper bound
queryPaths.p004Behavior: prisma.marketIndex.findMany({ where: { name: 'TAIEX', ...(asOf ? { date: { lte: asOf } } : {}) } })

queryPaths.previousBehavior: date: { gte: startDate, lte: endDate } — already bounded

backwardCompatibility: asOf is optional — all existing callers without asOf continue unchanged
